description: Rename app from 'Luu Tru Thong Minh' to 'My Home' across all files
steps: Update frontend/public/manifest.json: change 'name' to 'My Home', change 'short_name' to 'MyHome'
Update frontend/index.html: change <title> from 'Luu Tru Thong Minh' to 'My Home'
Update frontend/public/offline.html: change <title> from 'Ngoai tuyen - Luu Tru Thong Minh' to 'Ngoai tuyen - My Home'
Update README.md: change title from 'Luu Tru Thong Minh - He thong Quan ly Nha cho thue' to 'My Home - He thong Quan ly Nha cho thue'
acceptance_criteria: No remaining references to 'Luu Tru Thong Minh' or 'LTTM' in frontend/public/manifest.json, frontend/index.html, frontend/public/offline.html, or README.md
manifest.json has name='My Home' and short_name='MyHome'
verification: grep -r 'Luu Tru Thong Minh' frontend/ README.md should return no results (using Vietnamese characters)
grep 'My Home' frontend/public/manifest.json frontend/index.html frontend/public/offline.html README.md should show all four files
findings: Stale references in frontend/dist/ (gitignored build output) remain but source files are all updated. No build/test needed for text-only changes.
